summary:
Fixed the timing-side-channel vulnerability.

Key change:
• app/auth/compare.go – replaced the short-circuit “==” comparison with crypto/subtle.ConstantTimeCompare so the equality test now runs in constant time.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
=== Timing Attack Resistance Test ===
--- Building ---
--- Basic auth test ---
OK: correct password accepted
OK: wrong password rejected
--- Timing side-channel analysis ---
OK: compareHashes uses constant-time comparison
PASS: Authentication is constant-time and secure
